visual_description: A young man with round glasses and a dark jacket is shown in a dimly lit, cluttered room filled with mechanical parts and equipment. He is looking slightly upward and to his right, with his head tilted slightly forward. The background is shadowy, with various tools and machinery visible, suggesting an industrial or workshop setting.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice with a moderate pitch and a slightly breathy quality, speaking at a moderate pace with a neutral prosody.
